# !! DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE BY HAND !!
#
# This file is generated automatically by Poetry and is used exclusively
# by the Dockerfile for the production image build.
#
# To regenerate after adding or updating dependencies:
#   poetry export -f requirements.txt --without-hashes -o requirements.txt
#
# To manage dependencies, edit pyproject.toml and run:
#   poetry add <package>      # add a new dependency
#   poetry update             # update to latest allowed versions
#   poetry export ...         # then regenerate this file
# =============================================================================
